name: Shell Injection
description: Parameter-derived value interpolated into a string passed to a shell execution function (execSync, exec, spawn) without sanitization.
smt2Template:
(declare-const input_has_metachar Int)
(declare-const input_sanitized Int)
(declare-const shell_expands Int)
(assert (= input_sanitized 0))
(assert (= input_has_metachar 1))
(assert (=> (and (= input_has_metachar 1) (= input_sanitized 0)) (= shell_expands 1)))
(assert (= shell_expands 1))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: deploy script interpolates branch name into exec without escaping
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const branch_has_metachar Int)
(declare-const sanitized Int)
(assert (= sanitized 0))
(assert (= branch_has_metachar 1))
(check-sat)

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const input_has_metachar Int)
(declare-const input_sanitized Int)
; Guard: sanitization function called before exec
(assert (= input_sanitized 1))
; Can unsanitized input reach shell?
(assert (and (= input_has_metachar 1) (= input_sanitized 1)))
(assert (= input_sanitized 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: sanitization prevents injection
